"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_ball_brick_collision.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw-w64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_ball_brick_collision.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_ball_brick_collision.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw-w64\bin\g++.exe -g -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_ball_brick_collision.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o test_ball_brick_collision.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_ball_brick_collision.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_ball_brick_collision.dir\linkLibs.rsp
